overlays.archive_subtitle: Recovered research, experiment records, and higher synthesis controls.
overlays.alchemy_subtitle: Select materials, set the process, then confirm.

copy.menu_subtitle: Restore the tower, explore the valley, and brew unstable magic.
copy.menu_controls_secondary: {confirm} start  Z/X/C quick potions  F5 save  F9 load  {cancel} pause/back
copy.pause_resume_hint: Esc resumes. F5 saves. F9 loads.
copy.gameplay_observatory_back: Stepped back from the observatory lens.
copy.gameplay_observatory_aligned: The observatory aligns with the restored tower.
copy.gameplay_tending_ripeness: A careful tending pushes {station} to ripeness.
copy.gameplay_planter_ripeness_mutation: A careful tending pushes {station} to ripeness. {mutation}
copy.gameplay_planter_need_rare: Planters need a rarer ingredient specimen to cultivate.
copy.gameplay_fainted_home: You fell asleep and are dragged home.
copy.alchemy_repeat_none: No previous brew setup recorded yet.
copy.hud_sleep_warning: Too late to keep working. Get to bed before 01:00.
copy.gather_attempt_none: Nothing ready to gather here right now.
copy.gather_attempt_known: {name} is not ready here now. Check the journal for known conditions.
copy.gather_known_conditions_none: Known conditions: no special restrictions logged.
copy.inventory_fill_slot_catalyst: {name} is a catalyst, not a brew ingredient.
copy.inventory_fill_catalyst_invalid: {name} cannot stabilize a brew as a catalyst.
copy.progression_duplicate_unstable: That pattern is not stable enough to duplicate.
copy.progression_duplicate_need_catalyst: A starlight catalyst is required for duplication.
copy.progression_planter_mutation_status: {catalyst} infuses the bed and coaxes a {strain} strain.
copy.quests_dialogue_smell: {progress} {context} I can smell the {item} from here.
copy.quests_dialogue_footer_reward: Enter confirm  |  Reward {coins} coins  |  Esc close
copy.quests_dialogue_footer_delivery: Enter confirm delivery  |  {item} x{amount}  |  Reward {coins} coins
copy.quests_unlock_closed: This request is not open yet.
copy.npc_quest_location_fallback: Check the request board for delivery details.
copy.morph_hint_quality: A finer brew might reveal a hidden branch.
copy.morph_hint_catalyst: A {tag} catalyst could bend this recipe into a new shape.
copy.morph_hint_heat: A different heat could push this brew into a new branch. Try heat {value}.
copy.morph_hint_stirs: An altered stirring pattern may trigger a morph. Aim for {value} stir(s).
copy.morph_hint_timing: The branch seems sensitive to timing. Try a {value} finish.
copy.morph_hint_sequence: A different ingredient order may unlock a hidden branch.
copy.morph_hint_room: This formula may branch only when the room itself favors it.
copy.morph_hint_generic: The recipe is straining toward another form.
copy.brew_failure_quality: Quality too low to stabilize the recipe.
copy.overlay_safe_sell: Safe stock: not tied to active quests, known recipes, or potion use.
copy.overlay_keep_stock: Keep if possible: this stock still supports recipes or carried potion utility.
copy.journal_memory_conditions_unknown: Conditions not learned yet. The memory is still only a glimpse.
copy.journal_herb_summary_whisper_moss: Soft growth that feels older than the tower stones around it. Even when the patch is small, it carries a steadying quiet into the satchel.
copy.journal_herb_summary_arcane_dust: Residual catalyst powder that gathers where old magic has weathered rather than vanished. It never looks safe, but it is rarely useless.
copy.journal_herb_summary_sunleaf: A practical valley staple. Bright, common, and honest enough that most restoratives feel incomplete without it.
copy.journal_herb_summary_moon_fern: Pale fronds that seem to keep their own night-light. They read like a plant that learned patience from moonlit stone.
copy.journal_herb_summary_ember_root: A stubborn root that stores heat long after the ground should have cooled. Best handled like a promise that might turn into a dare.
copy.journal_herb_summary_mist_moth_wing: Cool powder and fragile structure in equal measure. The wing feels less like a trophy and more like the trace of a weather change.
copy.journal_herb_summary_field_bloom: Roadside flowers that make the plains feel lived in rather than empty. Their warmth is gentler than Sunleaf, but easier to trust.
copy.journal_herb_summary_quarry_lichen: Stone-fed growth with a chalky edge to it. It looks humble until the mineral aftertaste reminds you it grew beside broken alchemy.
copy.journal_herb_summary_reedflower: A lakeside bloom that opens where the wind has already been softened by water and reeds. Calm in the hand, cooler in the brew.
copy.journal_herb_summary_sunspike: Desert stalks that feel forged instead of grown. They hold brightness like stored pressure.
copy.journal_herb_summary_rain_orchid: Heavy petals, wet air, and the sense that the flower prefers being found during weather that makes travel inconvenient.
copy.journal_potion_recap_soothing_tonic: A weaker restorative, but not a wasted one. When a mix collapses without malice, this is often what remains.
copy.journal_potion_recap_lantern_leak: An unstable glow that still finds a way to be useful. It lights poorly, but memorably.
copy.journal_potion_recap_rush_draught: A rough stimulant that values urgency over grace. Better remembered as a warning than a standard.
copy.journal_potion_recap_healing_draught: The first truly dependable restorative in the tower's language. Plain medicine, which is exactly why it matters.
copy.journal_potion_recap_glow_potion: A clean working lantern in liquid form. Less dramatic than the myths, more useful than they ever admit.
copy.journal_potion_recap_star_lantern_elixir: The glow formula refined until it stops leaking light and starts carrying it with intent. Rare, exacting, and worth the trouble.
copy.journal_potion_recap_beastcalm_extract: A quieter brew meant to soothe living things without dulling them. The tower feels less cruel when this one works.
copy.journal_potion_recap_splash_glow_potion: A glow brew rewritten to act outward instead of inward. Proof that the workshop thinks in behaviors, not only ingredients.
copy.journal_potion_recap_echo_healing_draugh: A restorative with a second pulse folded into it. The first drink helps; the echo convinces.
copy.journal_potion_recap_delayed_stamina_ton: The same sharp force as the tonic, but taught to wait. Useful when timing matters more than impact.
copy.journal_potion_recap_stamina_tonic: A forceful motion brew with very little patience. Reliable when the body needs to move before the mind catches up.
copy.journal_potion_recap_murky_concoction: The catchall memory for mixtures that had ingredients but never found a point. Useful mostly because failure still leaves a pattern.
copy.overlay_alchemy_mouse_footer: Mouse: select material, click slots/catalyst, click buttons to adjust and brew. Right-click clears slots. Esc closes.
copy.tutorial_crow_intro: Crow: Start inside the tower. Gather Whisper Moss and Arcane Dust with E, then bring them to the cauldron.
copy.tutorial_save: F5 saves and F9 reloads your current run.
copy.tutorial_journal: Press J to open the field journal for routes, brews, and notes.
copy.tutorial_alchemy_open: Crow: Press E or Tab near the cauldron to begin your first brew.
copy.tutorial_brew_goal: Crow: Brew something restorative first. Mira needs real medicine, not experiments for their own sake.
copy.tutorial_potions: Use Z, X, and C for the first three potions on your belt.
copy.tutorial_gather: Bright nodes can be gathered with E. Early route notes build your journal quickly.
copy.tutorial_quest: Gold markers mean new requests. Talk to highlighted townsfolk or read the board to start your first hand-in loop.
copy.tutorial_mira_delivery: Crow: Take your first reliable draught to Mira in town. Relief is the fastest way to earn trust.
copy.tutorial_rowan_goal: Crow: Rowan needs steady light for the darkening road. A clean Glow Potion is the next useful step.
copy.tutorial_delivery_ready: A highlighted requester is ready for delivery. Return with E to cash in the order.
copy.tutorial_route_ready: Green gates can be restored now. Step onto the marked route and press E to open the next floor.
copy.milestone_greenhouse_locked: Reach 10 brews, 40 coins, and carry 2 Moon Fern.
copy.milestone_archive_locked: Finish star_elixir_for_ione, containment_for_lyra, and restore the tower floors.
copy.milestone_observatory_ready: Portal Observatory can be opened from the archives.
copy.goal_reconstruct_archive: Reconstruct the archive timeline from the console.
copy.goal_keep_working: Keep gathering, brewing, and filling the archive.
copy.observatory_locked: The observatory remains dark. The archives are not complete.
copy.overlay_shop_empty_sell: Nothing safe to sell right now.
copy.overlay_shop_footer: {switch} switch tab  |  {select} select  |  V sort  |  {confirm} confirm  |  {close} close
copy.overlay_rune_empty: Bring a potion and a matching rune here.
copy.overlay_archive_empty_disassembly: Bring a brewed item from a logged recipe.
copy.overlay_archive_disassembly_help: Enter confirm will break one brewed item back into its authored recipe inputs.
copy.overlay_archive_empty_duplication: Bring a potion, ingredient, or catalyst plus a starlight shard.
copy.overlay_archive_duplication_help: Enter confirm will consume one starlight catalyst and the listed coin cost to create one additional copy.
copy.overlay_archive_footer_timeline: Left/Right section  |  Enter reconstruct  |  Esc close
copy.overlay_archive_footer_confirm: Left/Right section  |  Up/Down select  |  Enter confirm  |  Esc close
copy.overlay_archive_footer_filter: Left/Right section  |  Up/Down browse  |  F filter  |  Esc close
copy.overlay_archive_footer_browse: Left/Right section  |  Up/Down browse  |  Esc close
copy.overlay_journal_footer: Click tabs  |  Left/Right switch tab  |  Esc or J to close
copy.overlay_routes_all_restored: All current tower routes are restored.
copy.overlay_greenhouse_empty: No greenhouse beds are available yet.
copy.overlay_alchemy_controls_line1: {browse} browse  {heat} adjust heat  S stir  T timing
copy.overlay_alchemy_controls_line2: {fill} fill slots  {catalyst} catalyst  Enter or B brew  Y repeat  V sort  C clear
copy.overlay_alchemy_read_unlogged: formula matches, but not yet logged
copy.overlay_alchemy_read_degraded: result is known, but the current setup will degrade it
copy.overlay_alchemy_requirements: Needs heat {heat} stir {stirs} timing {timing}. Process: {process} / quality: {quality} / elements: {elements}.
copy.overlay_alchemy_unknown_catalyst_branch: Known base recipe, unknown catalyst interaction.
copy.overlay_alchemy_distort: The ingredients are right, but the technique will distort the brew.
copy.overlay_alchemy_missing_elements: The base formula is right, but the mixture is missing enough elemental weight.
copy.overlay_alchemy_missing_quality: The formula is correct, but the current quality will not stabilize it.
copy.overlay_alchemy_not_proven: The ingredients resonate, but the formula is not yet proven.
copy.overlay_alchemy_collapse: These ingredients will collapse into murky sludge.
